# Alkamanas UI

Alkamanas UI provides React components for premium SaaS dashboards, admin panels and landing pages.

Key files:

- `/README.md`: package overview and setup.
- `/AGENTS.md`: agent rules for implementation.
- `/packages/ui/src/index.ts`: public exports.
- `/packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css`: theme tokens and component utilities.
- `/registry/registry.json`: registry manifest.
- `/apps/docs/src/App.tsx`: component playground.

Core usage:

```tsx
import { Button, Card, SectionAwareNavbar, FlipCard } from "@alkamanas/ui";
import "@alkamanas/ui/styles.css";
```
